title: Radical Trainers Badges [Cobblemon]
description: Added gym badge drops for the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod and added correct badge displays in achievements.
body:
### This project is no longer maintained. 
### Please use hd42’s badge loot datapack instead.
***
**This datapack adds badge drops for the 8 Gym Trainers, which are also visible in the achievements.**

Tips:
- Trainers are from the [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) mod.

- The badges assets are from the [Cobblemon Pokémon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) mod.

- I have reprocessed the achievement texts of rctmod using translation keys to allow players with localization needs to create versions in other languages.
Therefore, this datapack also needs to be copied to the resource pack directory and enabled.  Currently, it includes English and Chinese.

I made this datapack for my server, and now I'm releasing it on Modrinth.
***
[Hd42](https://modrinth.com/user/hd42) has released two new datapacks that add badge drops and achievement icon displays for specific trainers.

- [RCT Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rct-badges-cobblemonpokemonbadges)
- [RCT PKGBadges](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rct-badges-pkgbadges)

He also mentioned that multi-language localization will be built into version 0.15 or 0.16 of rctmod, so I might abandon the maintenance and updates of this project.
